overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking across a wooden rope bridge toward a rustic lakeside settlement with canvas tents and NPCs. The scene features bright sunlight, clear skies, and a scenic mountain lake backdrop.

events.description: steps off the wooden bridge onto the dirt path leading to the settlement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wooden rope bridge toward the settlement ahead

entered.detail: wooden plank bridge with rope railings suspended over the cliffside
calm blue lake with distant islands visible
tall wooden pole supporting the bridge ropes

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks across a narrow wooden rope bridge suspended over a cliffside, with panoramic views of a calm blue lake and distant mountains. The bridge is flanked by rope railings and rocky outcrops, with no other people visible on the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic lakeside settlement with canvas tents

events.description: enters the settlement area with large canvas tents and wooden structures
pauses briefly to look around at the villagers gathered under the tents
resumes walking forward through the settlement

agents.ego_description: walking into the settlement and observing the NPCs gathered under the canvas tents

notable_agents.action: group of villagers standing and conversing under the canvas tent
villager walking near the tent entrance

entered.detail: large off-white canvas tent supported by wooden poles
short wooden posts and stumps lining the path
rustic wooden tables under the tent
small wooden structures in the background

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a rustic lakeside settlement with large canvas tents providing partial shade. Villagers gather under the tents near wooden tables, while the path is lined with wooden fence posts. The lake remains visible in the distance to the left as Geralt pauses to observe the surroundings before continuing deeper into the camp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a precarious cliffside crossing into the heart of a bustling lakeside settlement. It begins with Geralt traversing a narrow wooden rope bridge suspended over a steep drop, flanked by rocky outcrops and panoramic views of a calm blue lake and distant mountains. As he reaches the end of the bridge, the open landscape shifts into a rustic camp where the path is lined with wooden fence posts. The scene then expands to reveal large canvas tents providing shade for villagers gathered around wooden tables, with the lake remaining visible in the distance to the left. Finally, the camera follows Geralt as he pauses to observe the surroundings before continuing deeper into the settlement.
